title: Set up Supabase Realtime for live database subscriptions and presence
summary: Enable Supabase Realtime to subscribe to Postgres row-level changes (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), implement user presence (who's online), and broadcast custom events — all over a single WebSocket connection.
declaration: I will set up Supabase Realtime to push live database changes to your React components. This requires the existing Supabase setup (browser client from @supabase/ssr) to already be in place. If Supabase is not yet configured in this project, complete the Supabase setup skill first. Realtime only works in Client Components ('use client') — it cannot run in React Server Components.
